rationale: The activity shows a sequence of highly suspicious actions executed by the Administrator user. The deletion of shadow copies (A0), clearing of security logs (EV-001, EV-005), clearing of system logs (EV-004), and disabling of boot recovery options (EV-002, EV-003) are common tactics used by ransomware or other destructive malware to hinder recovery and forensic analysis. The rapid execution of these commands within a short timeframe further indicates malicious intent.
